chapter_title.en: Chapter 54 – Description of the marking (the sacrificial animal) and the yoking (Taqleed)

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (17/196)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (17/196)
text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنْ تَجْلِيلِ الْهَدْيِ وَ تَقْلِيدِهَا فَقَالَ لَا تُبَالِي أَيَّ ذَلِكَ فَعَلْتَ وَ سَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ إِشْعَارِ الْهَدْيِ فَقَالَ نَعَمْ مِنَ الشِّقِّ الْأَيْمَنِ فَقُلْتُ مَتَى نُشْعِرُهَا قَالَ حِينَ تُرِيدُ أَنْ تُحْرِمَ .

en.hubeali: Al Husayn Bin Muhammad Al Ashary, from Moalla Bin Muhammad, from Al Hassan Bin Ali, from Aban, from Muhammad Al Halby who said,

‘I asked Abu Abdullahasws about decorating the sacrificial animal and yoking it, so heasws said: ‘It does not matter which of that you do’. And I asked himasws about marking the sacrificial animal, so heasws said: ‘Yes, notch on the right side’. So I said, ‘When should we mark it’. Heasws said: ‘When you intend to wear the Ihraam’.
en.sarwar: 2. Al-Husayn ibn Muhammad al-Ash’ariy has narrated from Mu‘alla’ ibn Muhammad from al-Hassan ibn Ali from Aban from Muhammad al-Halabiy who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the decorating and placing something around the neck of the offering animal. He (the Imam) said, ‘It is not important whichever you did.’ I asked about marking the offering animal. He (the Imam) said, ‘Yes, mark it on its right side.’ I asked, ‘When should I do it?’ He (the Imam) said, ‘Do it when you want to assume the state of Hiram.”’
